name: codex_oacs_runtime
description: Optional non-standard repo development runtime layer that combines OACS-backed development memory with Codex context, evidence, checkpoint, and multi-agent coordination workflow.
instructions: Use OACS records as the durable source of truth for repository development sessions. Keep this as a reference/dogfood client workflow, not part of the OACS portable standard. The script entrypoint captures D1 repo episodes; reviewed D2+ memory requires explicit evidence-backed lifecycle commands.
